de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.extension.impl

Class KeYGuiExtensionFacade

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.extension.impl.KeYGuiExtensionFacade

  • public final class KeYGuiExtensionFacade
extends java.lang.Object
    Facade for retrieving the GUI extensions.

      • getTooltipExtensions

        public static java.util.List<KeYGuiExtension.Tooltip> getTooltipExtensions()
        Retrieves all known implementations of the KeYStatusBarExtension.
        Returns:
        all known implementations of the KeYStatusBarExtension.

      • getTooltipStrings

        public static java.util.List<java.lang.String> getTooltipStrings(MainWindow window,
                                                                 PosInSequent pos)
        Parameters:
        window - the main window.
        pos - the position the user selected.
        Returns:
        every term info string from every loaded extension.

      • getTermInfoStrings

        public static java.util.stream.Stream<java.lang.String> getTermInfoStrings(MainWindow mainWindow,
                                                                           PosInSequent mousePos)

      • forbidClass

        public void forbidClass(java.lang.String clazz)
        Disables the clazz from further loading.

        If this extension is already loaded, it will be removed from the list of extensions. This does not include a removal from the GUI in all cases.

        Parameters:
        clazz - a fqdn of a class

      • allowClass

        public void allowClass(java.lang.String clazz)
        removes a class from the forbidden list.

        Without a plugin lifecycle this is very useless.

        Parameters:
        clazz -
